steps.title: Use the requested Choctaw name
steps.content: The student wants the cup's name in Choctaw. The notes give that specific term, isht ishko, and identify the object as a clay cup in the Hina Hanta archive.

steps.title: Reject archive-only details
steps.content: A mentions the cup but not its Choctaw name. C gives the meaning of Hina Hanta and says the archive includes a cup, but it omits the cup's name. D explains only the archive's name. The answer is B.
